corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

candidate.source_identity_note: current clean maintainer revision; packaged Skill and runtime bytes are unchanged from behavior-v17
candidate.selection_note: Ten candidate terminals are reused only where exact evaluation-input digests match; four changed case inputs use their first fresh terminal receipts.

public_0_2.selection_note: Both receipts are fresh terminals for the exact changed case inputs on the pinned clean public 0.2 package; failure classes are derived from these outputs.

aggregation.method: exact-input reuse of ten candidate terminals plus four fresh candidate and two fresh pinned-public terminals
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

invalidated_attempts.reason: the case-local semantic oracle changed while runner and package inputs stayed fixed
